English: I was born into a family of Minnan puppet performers.
Chinese: 我出生在闽南的一个木偶戏表演世家。

English: My grandpa and my mum are both among the best.
Chinese: 我的外公和我的母亲都是这行中的佼佼者。

English: To my surprise, the post was flooded with warm answers.
Chinese: 让我惊讶的是，这条帖子收到了许多热情的回复。

English: ...the students were completely lost in the show.
Chinese: 学生们完全沉浸在表演中。

English: Since then, my puppet shows have drawn more attention both from home and abroad.
Chinese: 从此，我的木偶表演在国内外都引起了更多的关注。

English: Liang Qichao and "The Young China"
Chinese: 梁启超与《少年中国说》

English: In 'The Young China', he called on young people to shoulder the responsibility and take action to make China powerful.
Chinese: 在《少年中国说》中，他号召年轻人肩负起责任，采取行动，使中国变得强大。

English: Although it would be a hard task, Liang believed that China's youth would make history.
Chinese: 虽然这将是一项艰巨的任务，但是梁启超相信中国青年会创造历史。

English: So beautiful is our young China. It will stand forever in the world!
Chinese: 美哉，我少年中国，与天不老！

English: A Dog Called Money
Chinese: 《小狗钱钱》

English: But wouldn't it be better to get more pocket money?
Chinese: 但是获得更多的零花钱不是更好吗？

English: Because the more we get, the more we spend.
Chinese: 因为我们得到的越多，花的也就越多。

English: But Money went on.
Chinese: 但是Money继续说道。

English: The key is not how much money we have, but how we use it.
Chinese: 关键不在于我们拥有多少钱，而在于我们如何使用它。

English: First, we need to learn how to deal with our money.
Chinese: 首先，我们得学会如何处理自己的钱。

English: It's a short story by the American writer O. Henry.
Chinese: 这是美国作家O.Henry写的一篇短篇小说。

English: The story is about Della and Jim, a young couple with little money.
Chinese: 这个故事是关于Della和Jim的，这对年轻夫妇没什么钱。

English: Well, here comes the O. Henry surprise.
Chinese: 这就是O.Henry式结尾的出人意料之处了。

English: But O. Henry does not invite us to laugh at the couple.
Chinese: 但O.Henry无意让我们嘲笑这对夫妇。

English: Instead, he writes at the end that 'they are the wisest'.
Chinese: 相反，他在结尾写道："他们是最明智的。"

English: Sanxingdui is the remains of the ancient Shu Kingdom. It lies in the northwest of Sichuan Province.
Chinese: 三星堆是古蜀国遗址，位于四川省广汉市西北部。

English: As I continued their work, I often felt like I was standing on the shoulders of giants.
Chinese: 当我继续他们的工作时，我常常觉得自己站在巨人的肩膀上。

English: The surprising discoveries are the fruit of over 90 years of effort.
Chinese: 这些惊人的发现是九十多年努力的成果。

English: In over 40 years, I have never felt bored with my work in this magical place.
Chinese: 在过去四十多年里，我在这个神奇的地方工作，从未感到过厌倦。

English: Bit by bit, we will bring out more secrets of our history.
Chinese: 一点一点地，我们将揭开我们历史上的更多奥秘。

English: This 2021 hanfu show was a big hit on the internet.
Chinese: 这场2021年的汉服秀在网上非常火爆。

English: In the past, Along the River During the Qingming Festival was just a painting with a history of over 900 years in a museum.
Chinese: 过去，《清明上河图》只是博物馆里一幅有着900多年历史的绘画作品。

English: Over the years, the Palace Museum has made many creative products based on its collection.
Chinese: 多年来，故宫博物院基于其馆藏推出了许多创意产品。

English: People take pride in having them.
Chinese: 人们以拥有这些产品为荣。

English: History mirrors our past and carries our values.
Chinese: 历史映照着我们的过去，并承载着我们的价值观。

English: As a little girl, I was often told, 'Your grandmother Zhao Yiman was a hero.'
Chinese: 我小时候经常听人说："你的奶奶赵一曼是一位英雄。"

English: She died long before I was born. So, I never got to know her.
Chinese: 她在我出生之前很早就去世了，所以我从未有机会认识她。

English: According to my great-aunt, she was a kind person who always put others first.
Chinese: 据我姨婆所说，她是一个善良的人，总是先为别人着想。

English: How could a woman who loved her young son leave him behind?
Chinese: 一个深爱幼子的女人，怎么会抛下他呢？

English: Between the lines, I saw a gentle mother who chose to give her life for her country.
Chinese: 字里行间，我看到了一位温柔的母亲，她甘愿为祖国献出生命。

English: His name was Yuan Longping.
Chinese: 他的名字是袁隆平。

English: After he left college in 1953, he spent nearly 70 years working hard to solve this problem.
Chinese: 1953年大学毕业后，袁隆平花了将近70年时间解决这个问题。

English: Finally, he succeeded in developing new types of rice plants.
Chinese: 最终，他成功培育出了新型水稻。

English: Yuan passed away in 2021, but his dreams live on.
Chinese: 袁隆平于2021年去世，但他的梦想长存。

English: His example continues to encourage people to follow in his footsteps.
Chinese: 他的事迹继续鼓舞着人们追随他的脚步。

English: When the earth stands still
Chinese: 当地球停滞不前

English: Cars disappear from the roads, boats from the rivers, and planes from the sky.
Chinese: 汽车不再在道路上行驶，船只不再在水面上穿梭，飞机不再翱翔于蓝天。

English: Cleaner air and water allow them to show all their beauty once again.
Chinese: 更清洁的空气和水让它们重新绽放全部的美。

English: We need to think more about how to get along with nature.
Chinese: 我们需要更多地思考如何与自然和谐相处。

English: Perhaps we should remember the wise words which Montaigne once wrote — let nature take its course.
Chinese: 或许我们应该记住Montaigne写过的明智之言——让我们顺其自然吧。

English: In 1961, the World Wildlife Fund (WWF) was looking for an animal to be its symbol.
Chinese: 1961年，世界自然基金会（WWF）在寻找一种动物作为它的标志。

English: But in the year 2016, there came some fantastic news — the panda was moved from "endangered" to "vulnerable" on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species.
Chinese: 但在2016年，传来了一个令人振奋的消息——在《世界自然保护联盟濒危物种红色名录》中，大熊猫从"濒危"降为"易危"。

English: The Giant Panda National Park is three times as large as Yellowstone National Park in the United States.
Chinese: 大熊猫国家公园的面积是美国黄石国家公园的三倍大。

English: Research centres have also been set up and hundreds of pandas have been born there.
Chinese: 多家研究中心也已经建立起来，成功地繁育了数百只熊猫。

English: The panda is not the only animal that has benefited from these actions.
Chinese: 熊猫并不是唯一从这些行动中受益的动物。

English: We can find it in bags, bottles, toothbrushes, gloves, mobiles, cars, houses — anything you can name.
Chinese: 我们可以在袋子、瓶子、牙刷、手套、手机、汽车、房屋——任何你能想到的东西里找到它。

English: Despite all this, it has slowly and quietly shown its dark side.
Chinese: 尽管如此，它还是慢慢地、悄然地显露出了它黑暗的一面。

English: Some animals, such as whales, eat it by mistake and die.
Chinese: 一些动物——比如鲸鱼——误食塑料而死亡。

English: On average, we eat five grams of plastic a week. That's a whole bank card!
Chinese: 平均而言，我们每周摄入五克的塑料，这相当于一整张银行卡！

English: On 'Planet Plastic', there is no place free from this.
Chinese: 在"塑料星球"上，没有任何地方能摆脱塑料。

English: It may take hundreds of years to break down. Therefore, hiding the waste doesn't solve the problem.
Chinese: 塑料废弃物可能需要数百年才能分解，所以掩埋并不能解决问题。

English: Hey! Come on out!
Chinese: 《喂！出来！》

English: The businessman started a hole-filling company.
Chinese: 这位商人开办了一家填洞公司。

English: Trucks full of industrial waste came from far and wide.
Chinese: 满载工业废料的卡车从四面八方来到这里。

English: No matter what dirty things people threw into it, the hole took them all.
Chinese: 无论人们扔进去什么脏东西，这个洞都接收了它们。

English: One day, a worker was on top of a building.
Chinese: 有一天，一个工人在一幢建筑物的顶部。
